name: Setrobuvir
description: Setrobuvir has been used in trials studying the treatment of Hepatitis C, Chronic.

interactions.name: Mecamylamine
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Setrobuvir is combined with Mecamylamine.

interactions.name: Dexketoprofen
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Dexketoprofen is combined with Setrobuvir.
